svg.title: Anubis Silhouette - Egyptian Hieroglyphic Style
svg.desc: A pure black silhouette of the Egyptian deity Anubis, depicted in a stylized hieroglyphic art style. Anubis is shown standing, facing left, with characteristic features such as the jackal head with tall, pointed ears and a long snout, a human-like body adorned with a kilt, and arms positioned by his sides. The figure is designed to be tall and slender, suitable for a vertical column. The background is transparent.
